snippets.pull_quote: I have two ways of working — my own clients I'm building, and a contractual agreement with a CPA firm where I manage their portfolio companies too. It's adding up to almost eight right now.
snippets.website_angle: Fractional CFOs often juggle direct clients AND firm partnerships — show how the platform handles both.

snippets.pull_quote: It's not just me alone — I have team members who help put together the stuff, then I go and talk to the other people.
snippets.website_angle: Fractional operators rely on support staff; position product as the connective layer between operator and team.

snippets.pull_quote: Some clients I collaborate on strategies and investor relationships, sometimes sitting on the board. Others are more on the accounting side.
snippets.website_angle: Fractionals wear different hats per client — messaging can reflect that range of engagement modes.

snippets.pull_quote: Started fractional in 2024 — almost a year and a half in — and it's adding up to almost eight clients right now.
snippets.website_angle: Early-stage fractionals grow fast; speak to operators scaling from 2–3 clients toward 8+.
